channel.title: ReaL One
channel.description: maybe you have listened something included I AM THE REAL ONE

item.title: Hello
item.author: RockBear
item.description: Me Myself & IThese days I have a desire to write something but I don’t know what I should write clearly. Hope Someday I will know. //\————//\ /—————/ /—R O C K–/\\——–| /—B E A R–/ /————–/ Enjoy My Life Find More Interests. keep creative. :D Fine, I don’t know how to make an intro all the time. Anyway I’d love to continue my interests in my life. By the way I love My birds and Bear.
